data.content: Plan review approved. Verified: HeaderActions has correct button pattern (outline/xs/lucide icon), enqueueBeatScopeRefinement signature matches plan, useScopeRefinementNotifications already invalidates beat detail queries for auto-refresh, isTerminalBeat() guard exists. Minor refinement: use dedicated sub-route file at /api/beats/[id]/refine-scope/route.ts (matches close/ and deps/ precedent) rather than extending the main route.ts. Test strategy is sound — existing patterns cover both component utilities and scope-refinement mocking. No blockers.
